$comment: Model manifest for TAP/LLM operations. LLMs are planning-only and never authoritative for scheduler scoring, bridge validation, leases, or event writes.

models.description: Default TAP core brain. Stable 0.8B reasoning model for idea-to-architecture compilation, bounded planning, task decomposition proposals, and local CI agent assistance.
Optional TAP exploration model. Faster and more exploratory; may suggest unusual architectures but must not feed replay-critical decisions directly.

llm_forbidden: direct task creation outside architecture projection
